title: Laplacea angustifolia
intro: Laplacea angustifolia, also known as China root, is a type of plant used in traditional medicine, characterized by its rhizome. The health benefits of Laplacea angustifolia include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The bioactive constituents of Laplacea angustifolia include iridoid glycosides, terpenoids, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Laplacea angustifolia include decoctions, infusions, and tonics, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive problems and infections.
taxonomy: Laplacea angustifolia is classified in the family Staphyleaceae, which is a family of flowering plants native to tropical Asia. This family is part of the larger order Crossosomatales in the clade rosids. The species itself is a type of evergreen tree or shrub.
